_comment: sovereign-os auth-tier dashboard (R484, E11.M7+). Visualizes the operator-§1g 6-tier auth ladder for every operator-facing dashboard / API / web app: no-auth → basic → advanced → social → enterprise → network-level. Sourced from sovereign_os_operator_auth_tier_query_total{verb,tier,result} (Layer B, SDD-016) emitted by scripts/operator/auth-tier.py. Operator imports into Grafana via Settings → JSON Model. Closes the auth-tier surface-map FUTURE waiver 'dashboard: FUTURE — Grafana panel for fleet auth-tier state'.

panels.title: auth-tier query rate per tier (5m)
panels.description: Per-tier query rate over time. Tracks operator's auth-tier surveillance and configuration churn across the 6-tier ladder.

panels.title: auth-tier query rate per verb (5m)
panels.description: Per-verb query rate. list-tiers / registry / show / matrix / set — operator-discoverable churn pattern.

panels.title: auth-tier result distribution
panels.description: ok / unknown-tier / unknown-dashboard / invalid-transition / blocked-no-gates — operator-§1g error-class breakdown.

panels.title: auth-tier current state (tier × dashboard)
panels.description: Per-dashboard tier registry: which operator-facing surface runs at which auth tier. Drives the operator's 'is each dashboard at the right tier for its exposure?' question.

options.content:
**Operator §1g verbatim** (R450, E11.M7):

> "a mode of access from no auth at all by default to basic auth to advanced auth to social auth to enterprise auth and network level access and etc."

**6-tier ladder (low → high):**

1. `no-auth` — loopback or LAN-trust only; no credentials
2. `basic` — HTTP basic auth; HTTPS-only
3. `advanced` — bearer/JWT token; per-user revocable
4. `social` — OAuth (GitHub/Google/GitLab); cookie-session
5. `enterprise` — SAML/OIDC SSO; group-claim authorization
6. `network-level` — IP-allowlist + WireGuard/VPN gating before per-tier check

**CLI:**

```
sovereign-osctl auth-tier list-tiers
sovereign-osctl auth-tier registry
sovereign-osctl auth-tier show <dashboard>
sovereign-osctl auth-tier matrix
sovereign-osctl auth-tier set <dashboard> <tier> --apply --confirm-tier-set
```

**Metric:** `sovereign_os_operator_auth_tier_query_total{verb,tier,result}` (SDD-016 Layer B)

**Source:** R450 (E11.M7) shipped the verbs + ladder. R484 (E11.M7+) ships THIS dashboard, closing the surface-map waiver-slot 'dashboard: FUTURE — Grafana panel for fleet auth-tier state'.

title: sovereign-os auth-tier
